security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Healthcare interop scratchpad with PHI auto-redaction.
bundle.longDescription: Lightweight desktop scratchpad for inspecting healthcare interop messages. Paste HL7 v2 or v3, C-CDA, or FHIR (JSON or XML) and see them tokenized with patient identifiers redacted in real time. Drop DICOM files for header inspection and sanitized export. In-memory only; message content never written to disk.
